classes.name: Fighter
classes.description: A master of martial combat, skilled with a variety of weapons and armor. Fighters are the backbone of any frontline, combining endurance with tactical versatility.

subclasses.name: Arcane Archer
subclasses.description: A fighter who uses magic to empower ranged attacks.

subclasses.name: Battle Master
subclasses.description: A tactical fighter who masters battlefield maneuvers.

subclasses.name: Cavalier
subclasses.description: A mounted protector and defender of allies.

subclasses.name: Champion
subclasses.description: A martial specialist focused on physical perfection and critical hits.

subclasses.name: Eldritch Knight
subclasses.description: A fighter who blends martial prowess with arcane spellcasting.

subclasses.name: Legion Banneret
subclasses.description: A battlefield leader whose banner inspires and protects allies.

subclasses.name: Rune Knight
subclasses.description: A fighter who channels giant magic through runes and transformation.

feat_fig_fighting_style.name: Fighting Style
feat_fig_fighting_style.description: You adopt a particular style of fighting as your specialty.

feat_fig_style_archery.name: Archery
feat_fig_style_archery.description: You gain a +2 bonus to attack rolls with ranged weapons.

feat_fig_style_blind_fighting.name: Blind Fighting
feat_fig_style_blind_fighting.description: You have blindsight with a range of 3 meters.

feat_fig_style_defense.name: Defense
feat_fig_style_defense.description: While wearing armor, you gain a +1 bonus to AC.

feat_fig_style_dueling.name: Dueling
feat_fig_style_dueling.description: When wielding a melee weapon in one hand and no other weapons, you gain a +2 bonus to damage rolls with that weapon.

feat_fig_style_gwf.name: Great Weapon Fighting
feat_fig_style_gwf.description: You can reroll a 1 or 2 on damage dice for attacks with two-handed melee weapons.

feat_fig_style_interception.name: Interception
feat_fig_style_interception.description:
• Use your Reaction to reduce damage to a target within 1.5m.
• Reduction is 1d10 + PB.

feat_fig_style_protection.name: Protection
feat_fig_style_protection.description: Use your Reaction to impose Disadvantage on an attack against a target within 1.5m.

feat_fig_style_superior_technique.name: Superior Technique
feat_fig_style_superior_technique.description: You learn one maneuver and gain one superiority die (d6).

feat_fig_style_thrown.name: Thrown Weapon Fighting
feat_fig_style_thrown.description: You can draw a weapon as part of the attack and gain a +2 bonus to damage with thrown weapons.

feat_fig_style_twf.name: Two-Weapon Fighting
feat_fig_style_twf.description: You can add your ability modifier to the damage of the second attack.

feat_fig_style_unarmed.name: Unarmed Fighting
feat_fig_style_unarmed.description: Your unarmed strikes deal 1d6 (or 1d8) + Strength damage.

feat_fig_second_wind.name: Second Wind
feat_fig_second_wind.description:
• Use a Bonus Action to regain HP equal to 1d10 + Fighter level.
• Regain use after a Short Rest or Long Rest.

feat_fig_action_surge.name: Action Surge
feat_fig_action_surge.description:
• Take one additional Action on your turn.
• Regain use after a Short Rest or Long Rest.

feat_fig_signature_maneuver.name: Signature Maneuver
feat_fig_signature_maneuver.description: Learn a maneuver that defines your combat style.

feat_maneuver_ambush.name: Ambush
feat_maneuver_ambush.description: Add superiority die to Stealth or Initiative.

feat_maneuver_bait_and_switch.name: Bait and Switch
feat_maneuver_bait_and_switch.description: Swap places with an ally and add die to AC.

feat_maneuver_brace.name: Brace
feat_maneuver_brace.description: Attack a creature that enters your reach using your Reaction.

feat_maneuver_commanders_strike.name: Commander's Strike
feat_maneuver_commanders_strike.description: Give an ally an attack by using your Bonus Action.

feat_maneuver_commanding_presence.name: Commanding Presence
feat_maneuver_commanding_presence.description: Add die to Intimidation, Performance, or Persuasion.

feat_maneuver_disarming_attack.name: Disarming Attack
feat_maneuver_disarming_attack.description: Force a creature to drop an object.

feat_maneuver_distracting_strike.name: Distracting Strike
feat_maneuver_distracting_strike.description: Grant Advantage to the next ally attacking the target.

feat_maneuver_evasive_footwork.name: Evasive Footwork
feat_maneuver_evasive_footwork.description: Add die to AC while moving.

feat_maneuver_feinting_attack.name: Feinting Attack
feat_maneuver_feinting_attack.description: Use Bonus Action to gain Advantage on next attack.

feat_maneuver_goading_attack.name: Goading Attack
feat_maneuver_goading_attack.description: Goad a creature into attacking you.

feat_maneuver_grappling_strike.name: Grappling Strike
feat_maneuver_grappling_strike.description: Attempt a grapple as a Bonus Action after a hit.

feat_maneuver_lunging_attack.name: Lunging Attack
feat_maneuver_lunging_attack.description: Increase reach by 1.5m for one attack.

feat_maneuver_maneuvering_attack.name: Maneuvering Attack
feat_maneuver_maneuvering_attack.description: Allow an ally to move 1.5m without opportunity attacks.

feat_maneuver_menacing_attack.name: Menacing Attack
feat_maneuver_menacing_attack.description: Attempt to make a target Frightened.

feat_maneuver_parry.name: Parry
feat_maneuver_parry.description: Use Reaction to reduce melee damage.

feat_maneuver_precision_attack.name: Precision Attack
feat_maneuver_precision_attack.description: Add die to an attack roll.

feat_maneuver_pushing_attack.name: Pushing Attack
feat_maneuver_pushing_attack.description: Push a target up to 4.5m away.

feat_maneuver_rally.name: Rally
feat_maneuver_rally.description: Grant temporary HP to an ally.

feat_maneuver_riposte.name: Riposte
feat_maneuver_riposte.description: Attack a creature that misses you using your Reaction.

feat_maneuver_sweeping_attack.name: Sweeping Attack
feat_maneuver_sweeping_attack.description: Damage a second creature with the same attack.

feat_maneuver_tactical_assessment.name: Tactical Assessment
feat_maneuver_tactical_assessment.description: Add die to History, Insight, or Investigation.

feat_maneuver_trip_attack.name: Trip Attack
feat_maneuver_trip_attack.description: Attempt to knock a creature Prone.

feat_maneuver_whirling_strike.name: Whirling Strike
feat_maneuver_whirling_strike.description: A sweeping motion that pressures multiple enemies.

feat_fig_martial_archetype.name: Martial Archetype
feat_fig_martial_archetype.description: Choose a specialized archetype for your combat training.

feat_fig_martial_versatility.name: Martial Versatility
feat_fig_martial_versatility.description: Replace a Fighting Style or Maneuver when gaining an ASI.

feat_fig_asi.name: Ability Score Improvement
feat_fig_asi.description: Increase one score by 2, or two by 1, or take a feat.

feat_fig_extra_attack.name: Extra Attack
feat_fig_extra_attack.description: Attack multiple times when you take the Attack Action.

feat_sub_arcane_archer_lore.name: Arcane Archer Lore
feat_sub_arcane_archer_lore.description: Gain proficiency in Arcana or Nature and learn a Cantrip.

feat_sub_curving_shot.name: Curving Shot
feat_sub_curving_shot.description: Redirect a missed arrow to another target.

feat_sub_ever_ready_shot.name: Ever-Ready Shot
feat_sub_ever_ready_shot.description: Regain Arcane Shot use when rolling Initiative.

feat_sub_combat_superiority.name: Combat Superiority
feat_sub_combat_superiority.description: Gain superiority dice to fuel maneuvers.

feat_sub_improved_superiority.name: Improved Superiority
feat_sub_improved_superiority.description: Your superiority dice turn into d10s (then d12s).

feat_sub_cavalier_bonus_proficiency.name: Bonus Proficiency
feat_sub_cavalier_bonus_proficiency.description: Gain proficiency in one social or historical skill.

feat_sub_born_to_the_saddle.name: Born to the Saddle
feat_sub_born_to_the_saddle.description: Advantage on checks to stay mounted.

feat_sub_unwavering_mark.name: Unwavering Mark
feat_sub_unwavering_mark.description: Mark a target to punish them for ignoring you.

feat_sub_warding_maneuver.name: Warding Maneuver
feat_sub_warding_maneuver.description: Add die to AC for you or an ally.

feat_sub_hold_the_line.name: Hold the Line
feat_sub_hold_the_line.description: Lock enemies in place with opportunity attacks.

feat_sub_improved_critical.name: Improved Critical
feat_sub_improved_critical.description: Score a Critical Hit on a 19 or 20.

feat_sub_remarkable_athlete.name: Remarkable Athlete
feat_sub_remarkable_athlete.description: Add half PB to physical checks.

feat_sub_superior_critical.name: Superior Critical
feat_sub_superior_critical.description: Score a Critical Hit on an 18, 19, or 20.

feat_sub_weapon_bond.name: Weapon Bond
feat_sub_weapon_bond.description: Bond with a weapon and summon it.

feat_sub_war_magic.name: War Magic
feat_sub_war_magic.description: Attack as a Bonus Action after casting a Cantrip.

feat_sub_improved_war_magic.name: Improved War Magic
feat_sub_improved_war_magic.description: Attack as a Bonus Action after casting a spell.

feat_sub_uncheckable.name: Uncheckable
feat_sub_uncheckable.description: Authority that is hard to challenge.
